positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a crescent moon gazing down on a serene, glowing landscape. The composition is central and balanced, featuring silhouettes of stylized forest trees, gentle rolling hills, and cosmic elements like constellations and falling stardust. Utilize a limited color palette of deep indigo, celestial gold, muted teal, and cream. The style should be a blend of vintage botanical etching and modern minimal graphic design, characterized by clean lines, high contrast, and flat color fields suitable for apparel printing. Focus on intricate yet readable patterns and strong negative space.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, logo, signature, text, low quality, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame
